calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-03-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Adam DeLuca for Stephen Barone.

The Court addressed the issue with notice, stated that notice wasn't quite right regarding the amendment, and that given the status of the file that there is enough here for it to proceed. The Court then took the matter under submission and set a status hearing on the reserve for March 30, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Probate Examiner: Probate Director Sandy Hilton. Deputy: E. Lopes. Matter not reported.

Off Calendar Feb-13-2019 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-16-2019 Continued To Feb-13-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Adam Deluca for Stephen Barone.

Mr. Deluca stated that they expect to file their petition in about 30-days and that they are waiting for the 2018 tax returns to be completed. Status on close of estate is continued to February 13, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Counsel is to file either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration by February 6, 2019.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Cabasares. Not reported.
